name: VMware Carbon Black Cloud — EDR alerts
description: Imports VMware Carbon Black Cloud (CBC) EDR alerts (CBC API /alerts/_search export) into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT), with the impacted device linked as an ASSET and the threat category/TTPs kept as the classification. Severity is normalized from the CBC 1-10 scale. Idempotent by source+alert id. Offline: pass `file` = a Carbon Black alerts JSON, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A VMware Carbon Black Cloud alerts JSON export to parse
